A steerable world model of neural population dynamics

Set an intended movement. The model imagines the neural population activity that intention would produce — then reconstructs the movement from that imagined firing alone. It runs live here as the trained model’s exact forward pass.

03 · Decoded movement
reconstructed from firingalign —
Compact action-conditioned world model trained on synthetic population dynamics. Part of a benchmarked program (NLB co-bps, FALCON). The browser runs its exact forward pass — no server, no playback — matching the trained model to 1e−5.
